item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3min #LOOK — Callaway Golf has launched the all-new ‘USA 250 Collection’ to celebrate 250 years
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 3min #LOOK — Callaway Golf has launched the all-new ‘USA 250 Collection’ to celebrate 250 years of American history, innovation, and pride.
Will you be purchasing? 1 1 1 1 mil

item.title: NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 28min No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpe
item.description:
No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 28min No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar Cita Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 2h 1:08 Here's a snippet of NBC golf analyst Kevin Kisner's rant against CBS and its Masters coverage on @ForePlayPod.
"What are we doing? You have no commercials. Play live shots." 13 3 231 36 mil
